requested_scope: add a best-effort Rust scanner-persistence notification after a successful snapshot insert, without changing scanner cadence, score, registry, dispatch, or snapshot content
add a Python user-level ALR shadow consumer that LISTENs for the notification, drains bounded unseen backlog, and fails closed
add a dedicated least-privilege ALR database identity limited to SELECT on trading.scanner_snapshots and SELECT/INSERT on learning.alr_*
add a user systemd unit with one-instance lock, bounded batch/resource budget, graceful shutdown, and Restart=on-failure only; no cron/timer/fixed learning schedule
after source review and fresh alignment, build/restart only the Rust writer required for the notification and start only the ALR user service
denials: no Bybit/official MCP or exchange network call
no order/probe/cancel/modify, Decision Lease, Cost Gate, RiskConfig, Guardian, or dispatch mutation
no scanner cadence/score/registry/dispatch or snapshot-content change
no delete of scanner, order/fill, proof, audit, or ALR lineage data
